description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies, Inc. operates as a blockchain technology company primarily in the United States. The company engages in ETH treasury operations; BTC ecosystem services, including consulting and advisory engagements and equipment leasing; facilitation and optimization of third-party power and hosting arrangements; and disciplined BTC treasury management while winding down proprietary self-mining exposure and deferring new site buildouts. It also offers digital asset ecosystem services, including consulting/advisory, and disciplined digital asset treasury management. In addition,
